description: Requires trace_peer=1 in the [telemetry] config section.

panels.title: Peer Proposal Receive Rate
panels.description: Rate of consensus proposals received from network peers. The peer.proposal.receive span (PeerImp.cpp:1667) fires in onMessage(TMProposeSet) for each incoming proposal. Records xrpl.peer.id (sending peer) and xrpl.peer.proposal.trusted (whether the proposer is in our UNL). Requires trace_peer=1 in the telemetry config.

panels.title: Peer Validation Receive Rate
panels.description: Rate of ledger validations received from network peers. The peer.validation.receive span (PeerImp.cpp:2264) fires in onMessage(TMValidation) for each incoming validation message. Records xrpl.peer.id (sending peer) and xrpl.peer.validation.trusted (whether the validator is trusted). Requires trace_peer=1 in the telemetry config.

panels.title: Proposals Trusted vs Untrusted
panels.description: Pie chart showing the ratio of proposals received from trusted validators (in our UNL) vs untrusted validators. Grouped by the xrpl.peer.proposal.trusted span attribute (true/false). A healthy node connected to a well-configured UNL should see a significant portion of trusted proposals. Note: proposals that fail early validation may not have the trusted attribute set.

panels.title: Validations Trusted vs Untrusted
panels.description: Pie chart showing the ratio of validations received from trusted validators (in our UNL) vs untrusted validators. Grouped by the xrpl.peer.validation.trusted span attribute (true/false). Monitoring this helps detect if the node is receiving validations from the expected set of trusted validators. Note: validations that fail early checks may not have the trusted attribute set.

title: rippled Peer Network
